name: YouTube Short — AI News Pipeline
description: Generate a 60-second AI news voiceover script, produce audio with Charon voice, generate 6 matching scene images, and download all assets.
goalPrompt: 1. Go to aistudio.google.com, generate a 60-second voiceover script about the latest AI news, use Charon voice to generate audio, download the MP3. 2. Open flow.google.com in a new tab, generate 6 images matching the script scenes, download all images. 3. Confirm all files are downloaded and report the file paths.
